decision_trail.summary: Official X: Bankr x402 Cloud endpoints can now accept payment in any coin, turning tokens into payment rails for agents.
Added catalyst for x402 Cloud multi-token payments and watch items for fee routing, endpoint usage, supported tokens/chains, and BNKR value capture.
Co-founder mini-roadmap: TAPE verifier next week, Circle/app launchpad expansion, faster open LLM Circle, stealth bridge update, lite node/container within two weeks, and mini-paper.
Added catalyst tracking for TAPE/CT-format migration and Circle launchpad/encrypted-inference rollout, including watch-next criteria for migration docs, lite node, and third-party apps.
Related Markets.xyz account claimed KNTQ Season 2 final snapshot is Sep. 29 and distribution Oct. 1; no official Kinetiq confirmation found in-window, so tracked as unverified.

decision_trail.summary: Initial review upgraded: added sourced thesis/Hermes take, catalyst table, source table, token/product open questions, and watch triggers.

Official/team X: GitLawb shipped a fresh Playground UI with ad feeds for non-premium OpenClaude users; ad bid engine is still in progress, and founder says open-source coding-model research/training will resume.
Official X framed the Anthropic/Fable access restriction as a DeAI catalyst and highlighted Pluralis/Agora decentralized 8B training on consumer GPUs, reinforcing Akash's open compute narrative.
Official X used the Anthropic/Fable restriction to restate Bittensor's open, decentralized, permissionless AI thesis; useful narrative catalyst but no protocol parameter change found.
Official X tied AI-access restrictions to NEAR's sovereignty/agent narrative and separately promoted Chain Signatures as single-account cross-chain execution infrastructure.
